checks.desc: All 8 champ lexicaux present in FastRoute pool
text_registry.json has only 4 empty stubs — all UI text hardcoded in scripts (Calendar.gd:20-73, Collection.gd:17-19, HubAntre.gd:848-926)
Trust tier skew: T0=79.4% (643), T3=5.4% (44) — T3 thin for high-trust players
chance field: only 47 cards (thinnest of 8 fields) — below parity with esprit=305, logique=87
52 unique verbs found vs bible 45-verb closed list — 7 extra verbs (chercher au hasard, fouiller a l'aveugle, tendre l'oreille, etc.) may cause field detection ambiguity
Calendar.gd:20-73 ~30 hardcoded French strings (months, seasons, Celtic events)
check_run_end() was missing faction ending trigger (FACTION_THRESHOLD_ENDING=80). FIXED: Added faction_endings_available to all 3 ending paths. Task GDC-FACTION-ENDING-TRIGGER completed.

tasks_created: NAR-FACTION-ENDING-UI (P9) — faction ending choice screen UI
NAR-TEXT-REGISTRY-POPULATE (P21) — populate i18n registry with all UI keys
NAR-FACTION-ENDING-TEST (P24) — test faction_endings_available in all paths
NAR-CALENDAR-I18N (P70) — migrate Calendar.gd strings to registry
implementation_summary: store_run.gd:check_run_end() — Added var faction_rep = state.meta.faction_rep and var faction_endings = MerlinReputationSystem.get_available_endings(faction_rep) at top. Added faction_endings_available key to all 3 'ended:true' return dicts (life_depleted, victory, hard_max). Bible s.3.8 compliance: faction ending available at run end when any faction rep >= 80.
patterns_found: PAT-091: text_registry.json is a stub — all i18n text currently hardcoded in scripts. Registry architecture exists but needs population.
PAT-092: Trust tier skew (T0=79.4%) is natural for new content but T3 needs deliberate authoring.
PAT-093: verb count drift (52 vs 45) suggests authors added synonyms over time — periodic verb normalization needed.
